chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4916 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.21861/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 26-03-2025 Mr. Muhammad Ahmed Hussain, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri, advocate for respondent. Learned counsel for the petitioner files statement which is taken on record. Learned counsel states that the petition has become infructuous and it may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
